claims.summary: The embedding projection basis must be deterministic across restarts.
claims.disposition: Verified fixed-seed generation, OnceLock reuse, and deterministic basis tests.

claims.summary: Every raw projection column should remain above the near-zero threshold.
claims.disposition: Verified current basis-health evidence reports no dead dimension and bounded minimum-margin metadata.

claims.summary: Normalized projection columns should remain approximately unit length.
claims.disposition: Verified existing normalization and finite-column regression coverage.

claims.summary: Exact raw column-health values should be inspectable without changing the codec.
claims.disposition: Routed to the existing read-only projection-basis health receipt and deterministic fixture.

claims.summary: The projection basis may eventually need dynamic rotation.
claims.disposition: Held for Tier 5 operator approval because basis rotation changes the live representation contract and transported features.
